# Open the Armory

> [!abstract] ⚪ Event · Cost: **1** · Neutral

---

**Action**: Search the top 10 cards of your deck for a **_Weapon**_  or **_Armor**_  attachment and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.
**Valour Action**: Search the top 5 cards of your deck for a **_Weapon**_  or **_Armor**_  attachment and put it into play. Shuffle your deck.

**Pack:** [[The Dungeons of Cirith Gurat]] #118
